feedback:
The sequence centers on unboxing the iPhone 16 Pro in Desert Titanium on a wooden table with a front-view angle, but it does not follow the gold standard’s timestamp cadence or top-down, multi-shot progression. Narration adds useful context about the box and color, yet the visuals could better emphasize the two-hand interaction, the sealed box opening, and the phone’s camera bump. To align, adopt a four-shot sequence with 2-second intervals, begin with a top-down view of a sealed box, show lid lifting, reveal the Desert Titanium phone face-down, then lift for a side/macro view of the finish and camera module, and optionally add a peel macro with SFX cues.
